ksa_text: Knowledge of database administration and lifecycle management, including database provisioning, configuration, maintenance, performance monitoring, patching, version upgrades, and end-of-life migration planning.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DA-K-015 (Data Architecture/Knowledge) excluded as edge_case (composite 0.419, highest: EU AI Act at 0.419). Domain prior: edge. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with edge_case classification, composite 0.419, and Data Architecture (DA) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Data Architecture KSA (composite 0.419)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Data Quality Manager job postings does not surface this Data Architecture competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
